# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup 

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyQueue
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTopic
  
Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # Retain messages for one day (in seconds)
      VisibilityTimeout: 30          # Processing time for each message is 30 seconds 
  
  MyTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName
      
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: 
              - "sqs:SendMessage"
              - "sqs:ReceiveMessage"
              - "sqs:DeleteMessage"
